basic_details.job_title: BEL Project Engineer-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Engineer-I posts! Published under Advt. No. 6050/HR (SC&US)/PE/2026 at BEL Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 4 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 32 years age group and possessing B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) qualification can apply offline up to 16 June 2026. Find all details about the BEL Project Engineer-I new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit as on 01.05.2026: 32 Years. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: Other Backward Classes (Non Creamy Layer): 3 Years Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe: 5 Years Persons with Benchmark Disability having minimum 40% disability: 10 Years

qualification.details: Project Engineer (PE)-I: 4 Years B.E./ B.Tech/ B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) with Pass Class from a recognized University/Institution in Electronics: Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Telecommunication/ Communication/Telecommunication. Minimum 2 years of relevant post qualification industrial experience.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of Rs. 40,000/- per month for the 1st year, Rs. 45,000/- for 2nd year, Rs. 50,000/- for 3rd year and Rs. 55,000/- for 4th year. Additional Rs. 12,000/- per year for expenses like insurance premium, attire allowance, stitching charges, footwear allowance etc. Medical Insurance cover for Rs. 2 lakhs per annum and Life Cover Insurance for Rs. 5 lakhs per annum required. Area allowance at the rate of 10% of the consolidated remuneration for those posted outside Bengaluru. Lunch allowance of Rs. 150/- per day for those detailed on Company's work outside factory premises for 3 hours or more. Retention Bonus of Rs. 25,000/- for every completed year, total Rs. 1,00,000/- at the end of 4 years.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
